name: Human Entertainment
description: Japanese developer known for Fire Pro Wrestling, Clock Tower, SOS, and The Firemen.

eras.title: Super Famicom Era
eras.description: Human Entertainment builds its identity through Fire Pro Wrestling, Clock Tower, The Firemen, and distinctive Super Famicom action/adventure games.

eras.title: Late Console Era
eras.description: The company continues with PlayStation and Saturn releases before closing at the end of the decade.
